title: HumanAIOS Molt State Schema
description: Machine-readable organism state for HumanAIOS molt cycle tracking. Validates the biological coordination protocol state declared in MOLT_STATE.md.

molt_stage.description: Current molt stage. pre_molt = Layer 1 not yet active. mid_molt = Layer 1 active, Layer 2 in progress. post_molt = Layer 2+ stable.

current_layer.description: The highest fully active layer (1, 2, or 3).

target_layer.description: The layer currently being hardened toward.

molt_initiated.description: ISO 8601 date when the current molt stage was initiated.

estimated_hardening.description: Estimated ISO 8601 date when the current molt stage will complete. Null if unknown.

biological_systems.description: Health status of each biological system analogue.

analogue.description: HumanAIOS analogue — file, surface, or system name.

status.description: ACTIVE = fully operational. FORMING = in development. DORMANT = not yet started. SHED = superseded/retired.

validity_confidence.description: Confidence in the strength of this biological analogy. high = clean mapping. medium = functional parallel but mechanism differs. low = loose or speculative mapping.

validity_notes.description: Explanation of the analogy's strength or limitations. Required when validity_confidence is medium or low.

molt_inhibitors.description: Current blockers preventing layer hardening or Gate 3 approach. Append-only in practice.

resolution_path.description: How this inhibitor can be resolved.

gate_3_conditions.description: Gate 3 activation conditions for Layer 2 → Layer 3 transition. All three must be true simultaneously. Source: SEED.md §6.2.

dataset_b_live.description: Dataset B collection surface is live.

revenue_positive_month.description: At least one revenue-positive month has been recorded.

molt_trigger_log.description: Append-only log of events that triggered layer transitions or molt-stage changes.

trigger.description: Plain-language description of what triggered the transition.

layer_impact.description: Which layer was affected and how.

authority.description: Zone authority that ratified this transition.

biological_systems.name: apoptosis
biological_systems.validity_notes: Biological apoptosis is programmed cell death; P5 is a quality filter that archives rather than destroys. Functional parallel holds; cellular mechanism differs.

biological_systems.name: circadian_rhythm
biological_systems.validity_notes: A charter is a one-time bounded period, not a repeating cycle. Mapping tightens if future charter cycles are defined.

molt_inhibitors.description: Five open Night decisions on homepage deploy
migration_009 not yet a committed file in repo
arXiv paper submission on hold during OR&D phase

molt_trigger_log.trigger: SEED.md created and Zone 2 ratified. Operations repo established as single source of truth.
